'''Miso Paste''' is a soy-related crafting material for [[Miso Soup]].

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Miso paste.png
| id = miso_paste
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Soy
| stackable = 64
|Description=Salty! Good for Miso Soup!}}
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
|[[Koji]] + [[Soy Beans]] 
+ Red Mushroom
|[[File:Miso paste crafting.png|336x336px]]
|}
==Used in==
*[[Miso Soup]]
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0
